Injection moulding & prototypes in the original material
From exclusive prototypes to pre-series
up to small series we are your service partner
From consulting to design, tooling, injection moulding and quality control, we offer you the entire spectrum. We achieve our goal of supplying high-quality prototypes made of original plastics in the shortest possible time with commitment and high motivation. Customer satisfaction is the highest priority for all employees.
Our portfolio includes
Prototypes
Pre- and small series
Injection moulding
2K injection moulding
Insert injection moulding
Micro injection moulding

about.text:
1st Mould - About 1st-Mould
About us
Our most valuable asset: our team
Since the foundation of 1st Mould GmbH in 2005, our team has grown steadily and consists exclusively of highly motivated employees. The commercial department is the direct contact for your enquiries and orders. Your projects are realized by our designers, CNC millers and tool mechanics. They work hand in hand with the staff in the injection moulding department. Finally, our colleagues from the finishing department and the quality control department ensure that your parts leave our premises in perfect condition. All our employees and our temporary staff stand for the high quality of our services.
Company video
Company chronicle
2025
ISO 9001 - We are now certified and can officially demonstrate that we stand for consistent quality. The focus is on optimizing processes to improve performance within the company and meet customer requirements in the best possible way.
June brings some very special highlights:
1st Mould celebrates its 20th anniversary!
On June 12, we will be holding our 2nd in-house exhibition for customers and business partners under the motto “We shape your ideas” and look back on two decades of expertise and experience in the field of plastics and prototype construction.
In spring, 1st Mould was once again represented at several important trade fairs - the supplier fair Z in Leipzig, rapid.tech 3D in Erfurt and SENSOR+TEST in Nürnberg.
With a new trade fair stand and optimized logo, we were on the road at many exciting trade fairs in autumn. These included Fakuma in Friedrichshafen, formnext in Frankfurt am Main and Touristik & Caravaning in Leipzig.
REWE TEAM CHALLENGE 2024 - 1st Mould was at the start again on June 12 - at Saxony's biggest running event.
1st Mould opens its doors on June 4 for the 1st in-house exhibition “Incoming orders - and then?”.
On June 1, Sebastian Giebisch is also appointed Managing Director and takes on important management tasks together with Managing Director Bärbel Wünsche.
2024
2023
In November, 1st Mould presented itself at the formnext trade fair in Frankfurt am Main.
1st Mould under new management... in July 2023, Managing Director Bärbel Wünsche takes the helm with the support of the two authorized signatories Christian Sperling (Technical Manager) and Sebastian Giebisch and leads the team to new shores.
In June, an additional PV system is connected to the grid, so that production and the company fleet are supplied with green solar power.
Our sports team competes again in the 5 km run of the REWE TEAM CHALLENGE Dresden on 25 May.
Rapid.Tech in Erfurt opened its doors again from 17 to 19 May 2022. Live on site 1st Mould met regular customers, welcomed new customers and informed about current news from our production.
Acquisition of another automatic injection moulding machine for particularly small plastic injection moulded parts from 0.1 to 6 g
2022
2021
Two more automatic high-bay warehouses and pallet racks create more storage capacity for moulds and plastic.
Expansion of our photovoltaic system
Our E-fleet gets an addition.
3 more CNC high-speed milling machines strengthen our machine park.
2020
2019
At the end of June, we go to the Canoe Park Markleeberg for team training.
With the International Supplier Fair Leipzig in February, the Moulding Expo Stuttgart in May and the Rapid.Tech Erfurt in June, this year's trade fair trio is complete.
On 29 May we will take part in the 5 km run of the REWE TEAM CHALLENGE Dresden for the first time.
This year it's going to be sporty. On 12 April we will be getting professional support. Adi - known from "Mach mit, mach's nach, mach's besser" - will get us going at the first 1st Mould Sportfest.
Occupational health management is important to us. That's why a health and prevention coach has been strengthening our team since October.
1st Mould receives the second prize at the 2018 business award ceremony - donated by the DNN and the Ostsächsische Sparkasse Dresden.
Addit
